relationships: ber:Terra-iyi tmara ad mahleɣ akk tagara n yimalas
ber:Terra-iyi tmara ad mahleɣ tagara n yimalas s lekmal-nnes
ber:Sami tella terra-t tmara ad yexdem ayenni
ber:Dmitri tella terra-t tmara ad yeg ayen i as-d-tecreḍ Rima
ber:Ttwaliɣ dakken ur terri ara tmara ad d-yili waya
ber:Tella terra-iyi tmara ad awḍeɣ s axxam ɣef tis snat d uzgen
